message:
fix(connectors): wire with_retry_config to retry_config.max_retries in 7 more connectors

Same dead-field bug as twilio/youtube (fixed in c6bf3ae0): with_retry_config()
set self.max_retries (dead field) instead of self.retry_config.max_retries.
The actual retry loop uses self.retry_config.to_retry_policy() which ignores
the dead field, making with_retry_config(0) a no-op.

Fixed: microsoft365, airtable, browser, google-ai, figma, zendesk, plaid.
Also removed const fn qualifier from airtable and figma (mutable struct
field access is not const-evaluable).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
